text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day before training, I make my<n>way to the
track a little early and am<n>greeted by a vigorous
voice.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: C'mon, keep running! Work those<n>legs!

text_block_list.name: Sirius's Crew Member
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant! Were you watching?!I got a new personal best!

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Haha, see what I mean? Focus on<n>moving your
legs, and keep your<n>strides short and crisp.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli is doling out running<n>advice to a
large group of students,<n>looking just as reliable
as any<n>instructor. However...

text_block_list.name: Timid Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Oh dear! It's Sirius and her crew of<n>hoodlums!

text_block_list.name: Serious Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
What do we do? We can't train while<n>they're
here...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I take a look around to find worried<n>faces on
everyone not currently on the<n>track. I wonder
what the issue is...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: May I have a word with you, Sirius?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The student council has received<n>multiple
complaints that you and your<n>friends are unfairly
monopolizing the<n>track.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As such, we request that you vacate<n>the
premises so the other students<n>can train
undisturbed.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Nah.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Take a look at their faces... You<n>understand,
don't you?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
They've only broken curfew or some<n>academy
rules, but you lot have got<n>them so busy writing
lines or reflection<n>papers all the time that they've
got no<n>time to train properly.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
So it's on me to look after them and<n>give them a
time and place to train.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I see. But ultimately, it is still because<n>they've
broken the rules. It would be<n>difficult to maintain
the academy if we<n>didn't enforce the rules.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
So you're saying that it's fine to<n>throw these
girls aside over some silly<n>little rules?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text: Hah. Sorry, but no way I can agree<n>with that.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
There's a waiting list for everything<n>at this
academy, and breaking just<n>one rule is all it
takes to get pushed<n>back on the list.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Even if the circumstances that led to<n>the rule
being broken were completely<n>out of their hands,
it's all the same to<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
It seems to me that the academy's<n>"rule" is to
ignore any and all personal<n>circumstances.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
If we play by the book, these girls are<n>all goners.
Isn't that right?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Well, that's—

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and one more thing. You said<n>people were
complaining to the<n>student council, right?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
So where's the Emperor herself? If<n>this is so
important, why isn't she<n>gracing us with her
presence?

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I know. Give her a message for<n>me. Tell her if
she's just gonna sit on<n>that throne all day
judging us from<n>afar, we've got no time to listen
to her<n>either.

text_block_list.name: Sirius Symboli
text_block_list.text:
All right, folks, let's get back to it! Get<n>running!
Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Sirius Symboli is already back to<n>doling out
instructions to the other<n>students. While she
carries herself<n>like the perfect problem child, she<n>
also seems strangely dependable.
